message:
test(pt-core): add comprehensive rate limiter integration tests (process_triage-8z2)

36 no-mock integration tests covering sliding window rate limiter
and PolicyEnforcer integration:

- SlidingWindowRateLimiter: per-run/minute/hour/day limits, 80%
  warning thresholds, force override, check-and-record atomicity,
  override limits, reset behavior
- Persistence: cross-instance state, corrupted/empty state recovery
- PolicyEnforcer: rate limit blocking, reset, non-destructive action
  exemption, warning propagation, violation messages
- Multi-window: strictest-window-first ordering, independent tracking
- Edge cases: zero limit, u32::MAX, idempotent resets, config roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
